compute.cost_note: network-bound; OpenAlex cursor pagination plus one CORE fetch per candidate DOI

do_not_use_when: the discipline filter would admit STEM lab reports (tune --openalex-filter)

inputs.target: OpenAlex works API (keyless) + CORE v3 search API (keyed)

purpose: acquire academic scholarly articles via OpenAlex (discipline/OA filter) + CORE (full text) into the scholarly_article impostor pool (the population baseline argmove_profile profiles).
use_when: building the scholarly_article population baseline from open-access argumentative-discipline articles
